---
name: Docs unclear or wrong
about: Something in the README or docs was confusing, missing, or incorrect
title: "[docs] "
labels: ["docs", "developer-preview"]
---

**Where**
Link or section (e.g. "Try it in 5 minutes", "Using Qiju", a specific command).

**What was confusing or wrong**
What you expected the docs to say, and what they actually said.

**What would have helped**
A clearer wording, a missing step, an example, etc.
